title: A tasks Last Updated date should update when a comment is entered and updated

Description
When a comment is added to a task, the last updated date doesn’t update.  The data in a column on the task must be updated or toggled to get the last updated date to change.

posts.author: MoniqueWentz (Monique Wentz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When a comment is added to a task, the last updated date doesn’t update. The data in a column on the task must be updated or toggled to get the last updated date to change.

What are you trying to achieve

Newly added comments change the last updated date.
